creator: amdmi3@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 159961
Patch

sysutils/rubygem-winrm tries to install bin/rwinrm script, however it is not mentioned in the plist, which leads to stage-qa errors:

http://poudriere.amdmi3.ru/data/10-amd64-default/all_2015_08_11/logs/errors/rubygem-winrm-1.3.3.log

if this script is useful, see attached patch. If it's not, the error may be silenced by removing the file after install or using PLIST_FILES="@comment bin/rwinrm"
